biography:
Ahn Hyo-seop (Korean: 안효섭; born April 17, 1995) is a Canadian actor and singer based in South Korea. He gained recognition for his performances in television dramas such as Still 17 (2018), Dr. Romantic 2 (2020), Lovers of the Red Sky (2021), Business Proposal (2022), and Dr. Romantic 3 (2023).
